current_html:
§ 200.467 Selling and marketing costs.

Costs of selling and marketing any products or services of the recipient or subrecipient are unallowable unless they are allowed under § 200.421 and are necessary to meet the requirements of the Federal award.
proposed_html:
§ 200.467
Selling and marketing costs.

Costs of selling and marketing any products or services of the recipient or subrecipient are unallowable unless they are expressly included in the Federal award and necessary to meet the requirements of the Federal award.
diff_html:
1 paragraph changed · 1 addition · 1 deletion
